resources.description: Match results and statistics for the German Bundesliga 1993/94 season.

licenses.name: ODC-PDDL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License

description: Match results and statistics for the German Bundesliga football league, covering all seasons from 1993/94 to present. Each row is one match and includes full-time and half-time scores, referee, shots, fouls, corners, and cards. Statistics fields are empty for seasons 1993/94–1999/00 and 2002/03; halftime data is also absent for 1993/94.
